topics.title: George Takeo Prank and Production Conflicts
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout of a prank involving George Takeo, the dynamics of watching others eat, and internal tensions regarding production staff's treatment of talent.

topics.title: Production Standards and Guest Content
topics.summary: The studio discusses the internal process for vetting guest content, specifically regarding a song involving George Takei that required lyrical edits to ensure it remained appropriate for broadcast.

topics.title: Celebrity Sightings and Relationship Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores stories about celebrity-centric restaurants, a humorous encounter with Elvis Costello, the production of explicit comedy songs, and various personal anecdotes regarding marriage and dating.

topics.title: Playboy Centerfold Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a guest who is featured in the latest Playboy centerfold to discuss her experience at the mansion, her background in Sweden, and the history of the magazine.

topics.title: Playboy Centerfold and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with model Sandra Nilsson regarding her new book, followed by an interview with Janice Dickinson about her television career and personal life.

topics.title: Janice Dickinson's Modeling Career and Relationships
topics.summary: The studio features Janice Dickinson discussing her interactions with celebrities, her reality television career on Oxygen, and her past relationship with Sylvester Stallone.

topics.title: Comedy Stand-up Performances and Radio Segment Disputes
topics.summary: The studio reviews various segments including a heated argument between Shulie and Double A over reporting ethics, as well as stand-up comedy performances by Richard and Scott in front of a hostile crowd.

topics.title: Scott the Engineer's Comedy Debut
topics.summary: The studio discusses Scott the engineer's disastrous stand-up comedy performance in Cleveland, including his lack of preparation, a hostile crowd, and the humorous aftermath of his attempt to win them over with t-shirts.

topics.title: Comedy Club Performance and Airport Safety
topics.summary: The studio records a comedy set featuring Scott, who faces audience scrutiny during a Q&A session, followed by a discussion regarding aviation safety technology at major airports.

topics.title: Radio Career and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the host's past radio performances, his personal weight, and various anecdotes involving celebrity acquaintances.

topics.title: Bubba the Blob Contract Renewal
topics.summary: The studio announces that Bubba the Blob has signed a multi-year contract extension with Sirius, following intense negotiations regarding his role and the show's future.

topics.title: Personal Relationships and Weight Loss Struggles
topics.summary: The studio features a candid discussion regarding personal relationships, past weight struggles involving physical assistance with hygiene, and upcoming news segments.

topics.title: 2008 Presidential Campaign and Celebrity Endorsements
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on Oprah Winfrey’s endorsement of Barack Obama, the political landscape regarding candidates like John McCain and Rudy Giuliani, and various pop culture references including films and celebrities.

topics.title: Current Events and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including the discussion of celebrity tattoos, concerns over mandatory childhood vaccinations in New Jersey, legal issues facing NFL player Michael Vick, Barry Bonds' potential return to baseball, airport safety technology, and updates on the writers' strike.
